old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.47","title":"Recover Rust IPv6 and Meshtastic bounds","description":"Recover UDP/ICMPv6 boundary validation, DAD behavior, coalesced Meshtastic GATT message preservation, and explicit RouteRequest handling.","acceptance_criteria":"Oversized UDP and malformed NS drop; packet-level DAD vectors pass; coalesced GATT bytes are preserved; route variants are deterministic; tests/clippy and three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:54.738094Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:54.738094Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.47","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:54.861899Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
